baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Help me decide whether this payment flow should use Checkout Sessions or PaymentIntents.
evals.expected_output: A Stripe integration recommendation that maps requirements to the appropriate API surface and calls out Connect, billing, and webhook implications.
assertions: Compares Checkout Sessions and PaymentIntents against the user's requirements.
Calls out webhook and idempotency needs.
Flags Connect or subscription implications when relevant.
